Purpose-built for Canadian private wealth

The Operating System for Complex Family Wealth

A single system for insight, governance, capital, and decision making.

Built for Canadian advisory firms managing complex multi-entity family structures.

Request Early Access → Explore the Platform
The Problem

Managing complex wealth shouldn't require duct tape.

The Old Way

Fragmented, Manual, Risky

  • ×Spreadsheets stitched together across entities
  • ×Data scattered across bank portals, PDFs, and Excel files
  • ×No consolidated family view across custodians
  • ×Compliance gaps — Canadian regulators demand more than spreadsheets
  • ×Hours wasted building client reports manually
The Mozaiik Way

One Platform. Total Clarity.

  • ✓Entity-level mapping — individuals, trusts, holdcos, all connected
  • ✓Single source of truth across every custodian
  • ✓Consolidated dashboards, ready in real time
  • ✓Built-in Canadian regulatory compliance workflows
  • ✓Polished client reports generated automatically
The Platform

One platform. Every entity. Complete clarity.

Six integrated capabilities that give advisors a complete, living picture of each family's wealth — and the tools to act on it.

Entity Relationship Modeling

Map and visualize complex ownership structures — individuals, corporations, trusts, and holding companies — with clear hierarchies.

Consolidated Dashboards

See positions, performance, and allocations across every entity and custodian — consolidated in real time.

Secure Document Vault

Store, organize, and share documents by entity. Trust agreements, corporate resolutions, and client records in one secured location.

Compliance Workflows

Built-in workflows aligned with Canadian regulatory requirements — KYC, suitability, audit trails, and documentation — reducing overhead and risk.

Asset Allocation

Dynamic target vs. actual charts across the entire family. Drill into any entity or roll up to the consolidated view.

API Integrations

Connect to Canadian custodians and data providers through secure APIs. Pull in account data, positions, and transactions automatically.

Preview

Everything in one place. Finally.

How It Works

From complexity to clarity in three steps.

We help you model your world, not force you into a template.

1

Model Your Entities

Define clients, corporations, trusts, and holding companies. Map ownership relationships as they exist in the real world.

2

Connect Data Sources

Link custodians, data providers, and document repositories. Mozaiik pulls in data automatically.

3

Get a Unified View

See consolidated dashboards, run compliance workflows, and manage documents through a single interface.

AI that Understands Family Wealth

Pattern Recognition

Identifies trends across portfolios, entities, and time periods that would take hours to spot manually.

Entity Intelligence

Understands relationships between trusts, holdcos, and beneficiaries to provide consolidated views.

Event Detection

Alerts advisors to liquidity events, concentration risk, and rebalancing opportunities in real-time.

Historical Context

Links past decisions to current outcomes, building institutional memory for better judgment.

Natural Language Query

Ask questions in plain English. Get answers pulled from your entire book of business.

Personalized Insights

Learns from advisor preferences and family goals to surface relevant recommendations.

Coming 2027

Mozaiik Intelligence is currently in development.

Limited early access for Q3 2026.
